ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock is listed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock market data */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "turnover" INTEGER /* Total turnover of the stock */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in stock price */,
  "transaction" INTEGER /* Number of transactions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytic" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock table */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of analytical data (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the analytical data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user table */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock table */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user table */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock table */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
